name: Database Migration
description: Safe database schema changes and data migration workflow

steps.description: Plan database schema changes and migration strategy
steps.exit_criteria: Migration plan complete with rollback strategy

steps.description: Develop migration scripts with proper error handling
steps.exit_criteria: Migration and rollback scripts ready and tested

steps.description: Test migration on staging environment with production data
steps.exit_criteria: Migration tested successfully with no data loss

steps.description: Plan production migration with minimal downtime
steps.exit_criteria: Production migration plan approved with downtime scheduled

steps.description: Execute migration with monitoring and validation
steps.exit_criteria: Migration completed successfully with data validated

steps.description: Validate data integrity and application functionality
steps.exit_criteria: Data integrity verified, application functioning correctly

success_criteria: Schema migrated, data integrity preserved, application functional, rollback tested
